Index.about-me:
Web developer with over a year of experience in software engineering, graduate of Łódź University of Technology with the title of IT Engineer. My core stack consists of React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, SCSS, MySQL and Prisma. Additionally, during my studies and while creating personal projects I learned other technologies, such as C#, .NET, Java, Spring and React Native.

As of recently, I have also been gaining knowledge in the field of artificial intelligence and machine learning, focusing on the domain of natural language processing. I gained experience in Python, PyTorch and Pandas by developing a customer service chatbot based on a Large Language Model called Llama 2.

items.title: Junior Software Engineer
achievements: Analyzed complex SQL execution plans and resolved database bottlenecks, accelerating listing page load times by 95% for enterprise-scale customers.
Developed a custom Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, boosting developer productivity by expanding internal LLM integration and capabilities.

items.title: Junior Software Engineer
achievements: Implemented recurring bank transfers service, handling ~20,000 scheduled operations every month.
Helped maintain an established, long-term corporate banking project.
Assisted the team with developing new features using Angular and an internal design system.

items.title: Intern AI/ML Engineer
achievements: Developed a desktop and mobile interface for submitting and managing customer service requests.
Assisted in building a customer support chatbot based on Large Language Models (Llama 2 and Mistral).
Helped create classification models for categorizing user messages using Python and PyTorch.
Worked with AWS SageMaker to perform model fine-tuning in a cloud environment.

items.title: Junior Web Developer
achievements: Developed a ReactJS hook for saving, retrieving, and validating data stored in local storage, improving user experience by persisting form information, even after the website was closed.
Helped the US-based client with gathering and clarifying requirements for a healthcare project.
Refactored the project to implement accessible and semantic HTML and CSS to comply with WCAG 2.1.
Implemented unit tests with Jest framework.

items.title: Intern Web Developer
achievements: Assisted the engineering team in maintaining and developing a web catalog project.
Ensured code clarity, consistency, and correctness by regularly performing code review of pull requests created by other team members.

items.notes: Specialization in Machine Learning and Software Engineering. Participated in research on benchmarking a set of Large Language Models (LLMs).
Graduated with the title of IT Engineer. Thesis focused on development of a knowledge-sharing social media platform.

knowhow.title: Knowledge-sharing social media platform
knowhow.description:
Fully functional social media platform built using T3 Stack (React.js, Next.js, tRPC, NextAuth.js and Prisma). The database component was created using MySQL and hosted on PlanetScale. The UI was created with MantineUI. The platform is split into two main parts - the user application and administrative panel.

The user application allows anyone to view posts created by others using different content exploration methods - main page (with recent posts), trending page, topic page and search page. User can also create an account and customize it by changing the profile description, setting profile picture and more. This website was created with Responsive web design approach, which ensures that the platform is displayed properly across all screen sizes.

The admin panel allows the administrator to manage the content on the platform. Only user with specific permissions can access it, and such an account can perform a wide variety of different actions. For example, administrator can view user reports and decide, whether reported content is against platform's terms of service. Additionally, the administrator can manage users, apply penalties, or fully remove them from the platform.

digit-recognition.title: Digit recognition
digit-recognition.description:
Digit recognition system trained using MNIST database. The machine learning model was built with TensorFlow 2.0 and Keras libraries and it uses Convolutional Neural Network. The model has achieved an accuracy of 98.84%.

Additionally, the model has been attached to simple Flask backend, which in combination with interactive React.js canvas allows anyone to test out the model with their own writing.

racetrack-ranking.title: Racetrack ranking
racetrack-ranking.description: Web platform for browsing and reviewing different racetracks around the world. Backend was implemented with Express.js, and the data was persisted in MongoDB database. The user interface was implemented in HTML and CSS with the EJS templating language. This website was created with Responsive web design approach, which ensures that the platform is displayed properly across all screen sizes.

weather-app.title: Weather app
weather-app.description: Weather web app implemented in React.js inspired by iOS weather application. It utilizes Axios library to fetch data from Visual Crossing weather data API. The colors for daily temperature bars were implementing by manipulating the hue of HSL color model.

commutely.title: Commutely
commutely.description: Web calculator created with Bootstrap, HTML, CSS and JavaScript. It helps to inform people on the emissions that they produce while commuting to school or work. Additionally, it provides an estimate on how much money can be saved daily by using public transport.
